creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
The kscd that comes with the current x11/kde2 port crashes. Stack trace:

	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
	0x28bfac08 in wait4 () from /usr/lib/libc.so.4
	#0  0x28bfac08 in wait4 () from /usr/lib/libc.so.4
	#1  0x28bec0eb in waitpid () from /usr/lib

How-To-Repeat: 	Install FreeBSD 4.3-R or -S
	Install the port x11/XFree86-4
	Install the port x11/kde2
	Start kscd as a regular user
